system.description: This ragged pole with a spear and a silver-cable loop was the first prototype of what became the lightning hook. It doesn't work very well, but it was the first historically known charged object that could consistently interact with the Ghost Field.
system.additional_info: Apparently this bit of history is an important prestige piece in the turbulent intrigues of a number of underground cults led by Whispers. The city government would also like to display it in a museum.
